title: HideWindow Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub HideWindow (WindowID As SpelWindows, Parent As Form)
parameters:
WindowID	The ID of the Epson RC+ 8.0 window to
		 hide.
description: Hides an Epson RC+ 8.0 window that was previously displayed with ShowWindow.
examples:
Sub btnHideIOMonitor_Click _
       ByVal sender As System.Object, _
       ByVal e As System.EventArgs) _
       Handles btnHideIOMonitor.Click
    m_spel.HideWindow(RCAPINet.SpelWindows.IOMonitor)
End Sub
